hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); case "$cmd" in "git commit"*) echo '[pre-commit] auto-fix pass' >&2; (bun run lint:fix >/tmp/yauth-precommit-lint.log 2>&1 || echo '[pre-commit] lint:fix exited non-zero (see /tmp/yauth-precommit-lint.log)' >&2); command -v cargo >/dev/null && cargo fmt || true; if ! git diff --quiet || ! git diff --cached --quiet; then git add -A && echo '[pre-commit] re-staged auto-fix changes' >&2; fi ;; esac
